turns.user_message: My friend joked that I'm always the last to know things. I guess I'm just not that interesting to talk to.
I keep noticing people don't really ask for my opinion anymore. I must not have anything worthwhile to add.
I feel completely invisible in group conversations now. It's like my presence doesn't even matter to anyone.

generation_metadata.diversity_anchor: The speaker opens with something someone else said or did. This has been going on for a while.
